name: Ubiquiti Fiber Splitter 1:16
title: Ubiquiti Fiber Splitter 1:16
description: The UFiber Splitter is engineered based on fiber optic splitting technology, which allows a single optical signal to be split into multiple signals, facilitating the distribution of data to multiple endpoints within a network. This enables cost-effective and efficient utilization of fiber optic infrastructure, making it ideal for applications where signal distribution to multiple locations is required.

detailed_description.heading: Product Overview
detailed_description.text: The UFiber splitter carries data from a UFiber OLT’s long-haul cable and shares it with multiple UFiber ONUs. The UFiber Splitter is engineered based on fiber optic splitting technology, which allows a single optical signal to be split into multiple signals, facilitating the distribution of data to multiple endpoints within a network. This enables cost-effective and efficient utilization of fiber optic infrastructure, making it ideal for applications where signal distribution to multiple locations is required.You can connect up to 128 UF-Nano devices per one OLT GPON Port.

detailed_description.heading: Key Features
detailed_description.text:
mini-module type, steel tube
G.657A1 fiber
input/output 0.9 mm
1.5 meter cable length from total length of 4 meters
terminated with SC/APC connector

detailed_description.heading: Design and Performance
detailed_description.text: The UFiber Splitter is designed to provide high splitting ratios, allowing the optical signal to be divided into multiple outputs with minimal signal loss. Splitting ratio available in 4, 8, 16 and 32 outputs, this splitter efficiently divides the incoming optical signal into four separate signals, ensuring reliable data transmission to multiple endpoints simultaneously. Featuring a compact and space-efficient design, the UFiber Splitter is suitable for deployment in various networking environments, including data centers, telecommunications facilities, enterprise networks, and fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) installations. Its compact form factor enables easy integration into existing network infrastructures, optimizing space utilization and minimizing installation footprint.

detailed_description.heading: Technical Specifications
detailed_description.text: Engineered with high-quality optical components and precision manufacturing techniques, the UFiber Splitter ensures minimal signal loss and high reliability in signal transmission. By utilizing advanced optical fiber technologies, this splitter minimizes insertion loss and ensures consistent signal quality across all output ports, guaranteeing reliable and efficient data distribution within the network. Supporting a wide wavelength bandwidth from 1260 to 1650 nm, the splitter offers compatibility with various optical signals and networking equipment. It boasts a return loss of 50 dB across all ports and a directivity of 55 dB, ensuring optimal signal reflection and minimal signal leakage for enhanced signal integrity and network performance.
